mapper.sql: p.id, p.permission_code, p.permission_name, p.permission_type, p.parent_id, p.menu_key, p.route_path, p.component_path, p.icon, p.api_pattern, p.http_method, p.sort_num, p.visible, p.description, p.create_at, p.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM permission p ORDER BY p.sort_num ASC, p.id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT FROM permission p INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id INNER JOIN user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.sort_num ASC, p.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE permission SET permission_code = #{permissionCode}, permission_name = #{permissionName}, permission_type = #{permissionType}, parent_id = #{parentId}, menu_key = #{menuKey}, route_path = #{routePath}, component_path = #{componentPath}, icon = #{icon}, api_pattern = #{apiPattern}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, sort_num = #{sortNum}, visible = #{visible}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
